title: lycopodioides lobbii
intro: Lycopodioides lobbii, also known as Lycopodium, is a type of club moss that belongs to the family Lycopodiaceae. It is a slow-growing, perennial plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Lycopodium include its ability to relieve respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use in treating skin conditions, such as eczema and acne. Lycopodium can be prepared as a herbal remedy in the form of a tincture, infusion, or powder, which can be used to treat a variety of health issues.
